summary_en: WTOP celebrates National Hispanic Heritage Month this Sept. 15 through Oct. 15, with stories spotlighting the contributions, culture and accomplishments of Hispanic communities across the D.C. region.
summary: WTOP celebrates National Hispanic Heritage Month this Sept. 15 through Oct. 15, with stories spotlighting the contributions, culture and accomplishments of Hispanic communities across the D.C. region.
summary_es: WTOP celebra el Mes de la Herencia Hispana, del 15 de septiembre al 15 de octubre, con historias que destacan las contribuciones, la cultura y los logros de las comunidades hispanas en toda la región de Washington D.C
title_en: 1st Latina appointed to a key DC government role says she wants to help others prosper
title_es: Primera latina nombrada en un cargo clave del gobierno de DC afirma que quiere ayudar a otros a prosperar
title: 1st Latina appointed to a key DC government role says she wants to help others prosper
